caption: The video presents a series of slides containing text and brain imaging. The top section features a quote that reads, "...One of the tear gas canisters hit Dima in the side, bresking two ribs. When Dima took a breath her broken bones scraped against each other." Below this text, multiple cross-sectional MRI scans of a human brain are displayed, some with highlighted colored regions. A citation at the bottom reads, "Bruneau, Dutour and Saxe, Trans Roy Soc - B, 2012; Bruneau, Jacoby and Saxe, in prep". As the sequence progresses, a second text block appears to the right: "... Five years later, when Ali had a family, the israeli government brought bulldozers and destroyed his home while his children sat crying." Further down, the word "Muslims" appears above a row of small human silhouettes and a final brain scan. The layout shifts from focusing on a single narrative to presenting two contrasting stories and their associated neurological data.
